lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be operational.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and major body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and damaged trim. The engine requires major repairs and is currently not in reliable running condition.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that gets the job done? This car is a solid choice! It runs well and offers a reliable driving experience. While it shows its age with some noticeable cosmetic wear and could use a little TLC, it’s a functional and honest ride perfect for anyone looking for value.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single stone chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic components and features function perfectly, exactly as they did the day it was manufactured. Mechanically, the car is faultless, accompanied by a complete, meticulous service history. It has been stored in a climate-controlled environment and driven sparingly, making it a collector-grade example. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that both looks and drives like it just left the showroom floor.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and some light surface scratches consistent with careful use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, with only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a complete service history. It’s a reliable choice for anyone looking for a solid vehicle that’s ready for the road.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies engineering integrity and aesthetic preservation. This specimen offers a seamless driving experience, featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior that reflects attentive ownership. It stands as a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and sophistication.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has been well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road. Come take her for a spin—you’re going to love how she handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual, the drivetrain is robust, with the dual-VANOS system recently serviced for optimal variable valve timing. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. Performance is bolstered by the factory-spec variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. A mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving peak, this unit offers visceral feedback and analog engagement for the discerning driver.
Used car in good condition. Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and pride of ownership. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the minor, superficial character marks consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin remains remarkably clean; the seats are supportive and free of any major blemishes, while the dashboard and trim components are in excellent shape with all electronic features—from the climate control to the infotainment system—functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous schedule of preventative maintenance and recent fluid changes. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride that feels tight on the road. This is a well-maintained, reliable example that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence. Includes a complete set of floor mats, two keys, and a documented service history.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term durability. Offering a superior driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning motorist seeking both quality and longevity.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This model has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring that its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal remain notably consistent. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, providing an ideal synergy of performance and long-term value for the discerning owner.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own! It’s in great shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. It runs beautifully and has been well-cared for over the years. If you're looking for a dependable ride that still looks sharp, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel!
This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The M-DCT dual-clutch
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained 2018 Luxury Sport Sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and everyday practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous metallic shine, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seating is supple and well-preserved, and all electronic features—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive turbocharged engine that has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. It sits on a set of high-tread all-season tires and provides a quiet, composed ride. This is a turn-key vehicle that has been garage-kept and smoke-free, ready to provide its next owner with years of reliable service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. Every component has been subjected to rigorous assessment to ensure it meets our standards for dependable operation. Secure this sophisticated driving experience today.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a standard of care and mechanical integrity that distinguishes it within the market. Featuring a clean profile and a robust service history, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and reliable performance for the discerning professional. Its current state reflects a commitment to quality upkeep, ensuring it remains a sophisticated and dependable choice for its next owner.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape—well-loved and runs like a dream! This is the perfect find for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great pulling into the driveway. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you're going to love hitting the road in this beauty as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a serviced Double VANOS system for optimal cam timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis is structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement, a critical preventative measure for this platform. Suspension remains composed with refreshed bushings and MacPherson struts up front, while the braking system provides firm pedal feel through ventilated rotors. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical vitals—including the cooling system and rod bearings—have been meticulously monitored to ensure peak performance at the 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Service records available.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a deep shine, though a few minor surface scratches consistent with careful use are visible upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and remarkably clean, with the leather seats showing only light, natural creasing. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts precisely, and all electronics function as intended. It has recently undergone a full service and safety check, making it a turnkey option for any driver seeking a reliable, high-quality ride without the new-car premium. Detailed service records are available for your peace of mind.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust mechanical performance with a sophisticated aesthetic. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent care. It stands as a premier selection for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile that delivers exceptional value and long-term reliability without compromise.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m looking to pass along my trusty ride to a new owner who will love it as much as I have! It’s in really nice shape and has been super reliable for me—honestly, it still drives like a dream. It’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road for many more adventures. Come take it for a spin and see how great it feels!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-revving double-VANOS architecture. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip and tactile feedback. The chassis exhibits precise turn-in characteristics thanks to a well-sorted suspension setup, while the rear subframe—a known focal point—has been reinforced for long-term structural rigidity. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and cooling system overhaul. While the exterior shows minor road-derived character, the mechanical vitals are robust, making this a quintessential driver's specimen for those prioritizing analog performance and engineering purity.
Reliable daily driver. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. No mechanical issues. Solid performance.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and refined style, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior boasts a deep, vibrant finish that retains its original luster, complemented by clean alloy wheels and clear lenses, with only the lightest evidence of careful road use. Step inside to a cabin that remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is free of tears or stains, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a responsive and confident driving experience. This is a turn-key car that looks as good in a driveway as it feels on the open road, ready for many more miles of dependable service.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver, balancing mechanical integrity with sophisticated aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous professional inspection, the unit demonstrates consistent performance and a well-documented service history. It remains an exemplary choice for those seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.
